p1_introduction: This part of the form asks for basic information about the responsible party for the project to be certified, such as the name of the individual, company, or organization certifying the project and contact informationcertify for any future correspondence from OSHWA regarding your certification.
p2_introduction: This part of the form asks for information about the project you wish to certify. Information submitted here will appear on your project’s profile listing.
p3_introduction: This part of the form asks for information about your project’s licensing. In order to qualify for OSHWA certification, you must have chosen an open source license for your hardware, your software (if any), and your documentation. Your licenses for each of these elements will appear on your project’s profile listing.
p4_introduction: This part of the form asks you to certify that you agree to specific terms of the OSHWA Certification Mark License Agreement..
